name: WDG.org CXC GQ
description: MOU with CXC and follow up to drive GQ across 21 nations

name: MoUs
description: Finding and creating MOU with ideal Intellibus partners and schools

name: AI Lab
description: AI Lab is a school-based model that combines infrastructure, curriculum, and people to build practical AI skills and community-focused solutions. Each lab includes reliable connectivity, interactive touch devices, and a local AI inferencing cluster, enabling students to learn and apply AI even with limited internet access. Students progress through structured skill levels and real-world projects aligned to local needs, supported by trained staff and student ambassadors, making the model scalable and impact-driven.

name: Youth Pipeline Activaiton
description: 3 Hackathons across all schools + 3 AI Labs with 1 full operational, youth mapped (ages 1–25), and first learning + dorm model operational + National and International Study Trips (for Learning and exposure e.g. Tour Operators Mobay)

name: Census
description: Deep Data Collection of People (Age, Skills, Health, Job), Infra (Roads, Water, Broadband, Electricy, Sanitation), Economic (Businesses Revenue, Health, Loans)

name: AI Academy
description: Physical Space for 1000 people training and jobs (managed by Intellibus)

name: Down Town Development
description: The Downtown Development Project focuses on transforming selected downtown parcels into a modern mixed use destination. The development will include a public park, corporate office spaces, an event hall, commercial retail spaces, and a boardwalk area. The goal is to create an economic and community hub that attracts businesses, residents, and visitors while generating long term revenue.

name: Farmers Organized + Income Flowing
description: 500 farmers formally organized (by community), a functioning aggregation & sales mechanism, & first recurring buyers & Loan Program Fleshed out.

name: NMDT.org
description: Trust Development Plan for North Manchester economic transformation across sectors, and including Solar City and AI Academy site development and:

name: Small Businesses and Tradesmen Group Activated and Funded
description: Identified and Organized Small Businesses and Funded via a Funding Partner

name: Manchester Residential Area
description: The Manchester Residential Area Project focuses on building housing and operational support facilities for Intellibus team members working in Manchester. The development will include a main executive residence and additional housing units for project staff. The location also provides a strategic overlook of surrounding development lands, supporting long term expansion planning.

name: Nirvana Park
description: Nirvana Park is a premium wellness and recreation park designed to deliver a luxury outdoor experience unlike any existing park in Jamaica. The park will feature high end finishes, event spaces, monuments, and themed wellness attractions. The project aims to create a monetized destination that attracts both local and international visitors while funding future park expansions.

name: Land Mapping
description: The Land Mapping Application Project focuses on building an advanced mapping system that uses satellite imagery, AI tools, and property ownership data to support development planning. The application will help identify land ownership, support land canvassing, and improve infrastructure and development decisions. The system will support projects across Manchester, Kingston, and other future expansion areas.

name: AI Academy Curriculum
description: Standardize and operationalize the Intellibus AI Academy curriculum into a repeatable training system that produces deployment-ready squads, tracks readiness via GQ diagnostics/retests, and preserves institutional and client knowledge in a single source of truth.

name: GQ Platform
description: All GQs administered + what's needed for REDI & other Programmes

name: Agency and Ministry Automation
description: Automation of Backends for all Agencies and Ministries that receive paper today from the Constituency Office to switch to digital intake and digital response.

name: Broadband Network
description: Implementation (IFC pathway)

name: NARRA & Funding
description: Review of NARRA and Funding Sources to determine how funds are used for long term Resilience — SWF (Sovereign Wealth Fund)

name: REDI Program
description: Rural Economic Development Initiative to culturaly and economically integrated 10,000 people across 100 communties in North East Manchester

name: Research Reports
description: Build a high-frequency, premium research publishing engine that produces well-designed, thorough white-paper style reports tailored to specific customers (targeting ~1 publishable report per day/week, not news).

name: Grants Portal
description: Operating platform for identifying focused grants/donors and managing end-to-end distributed funding

name: SPEED Initiative
description:
Transform Experience in MDAs (Ministries, Departments and Agencies)
— Investor Services — Whiteglove Experience for Qualified Investors (including Research, Land Leasing or Acquisition, Incorporation, Taxation and Banking)
— Citizen Services — Whiteglove Experience for Citizens (One ID, Tax, Motor Vehicles, Passport, Work Permits, etc)

name: WDG Grants Sourcing
description: Focused grants and donors for selected WDG projects in Jamaica and the Caricom

name: WDG Tv
description: Media backbone of the WDG ecosystem — uniting policy, technology, and people through storytelling and live engagement

name: Intellibus Care Coordination
description: Set up of US not-for-profit vehicle for grant and donor funding

name: Intellibus Care Telemedicine
description: A secure, web-based telehealth and electronic medical records (EMR) application designed for doctors serving patients in Jamaica’s underserved and storm-affected communities

name: Intellibus Care Website
description: Website to engage citizens in telehealth initiative drive improved NCD outcomes

name: Solar City
description: Creation of digital city in Jamaica as regional digital hub of the future housing AI Academy, student, staff and associated commercial and community faciulities, as well as other landmark enterprises (e.g. healthcare, pharma, tech

name: WDG Outreach
description: Plan for focused engagement with key organisations, NGOs and governments to align with WDG principles of personal and national data sovereigny, creation of unified country and regional data, and promotion of scaled digital infrastructure development

name: WDG Website
description:
The WDG website is the official digital home of World Digital Governance, designed to clearly present its policy frameworks, standards library, and ethical AI model in a structured, accessible format.

It acts as the public gateway for governments, partners, and stakeholders to understand, adopt, and collaborate around the PROSE-based digital governance framework.

name: WDG Ontology
description: A harmonised digital ontology to enhance unification and interoperability across the Caricom — to Model & Reflect the Reality of Information in  the Digital / Physical World as accurately as possible

name: WDG Policy
description: Ongoing development of WDG principles and policy through collaboration in the core and extended WDG policy working group

name: World Bank Digitalisation Project
description:
Automation roadmap defined & initial pilot automations underway.
— Broadband, Financial Inclusion (digital wallet) etc

name: China procurement
description: Sourcing and purchasing from China

name: WDG Client Certification
description: Certify Caribbean software companies' new platforms and products

name: WDG CDCC
description: Establishment of  the Caricom Caribbean Digital Coordination Commission (extension of the Caricom's proposed Caribbean Digital Safety Commission) as the oversight body of WDG digital principles across the region

name: WDG CHOGM Participation
description: Full WDG participation in CHOGM main Meeting events as well as side meetings such as Youth, Jobs, Women, Business and Digital sessions. Key objective to have Ed Watal speak in keynote addresses, increase awareness of WDG objectives among CHOGM nations, and connect with key potential funding organisations

name: WDG Caricom Treaty
description: Signing of Digital Job Creation Treaty between Caricom, CTU and Intellibus to bring WDG into being as a Treaty Organisation

name: USE White Paper Project
description: Transform the draft USE/HIS White Paper and engage a core research team in refining, critiquing and redrafting the paper into a format that can be the basis of a compelling case for a new investable asset form to improve the credit rating of developiong nations based on the implicit future value of an educated workforce.

name: WDG Core Working Group Caricom Policy Template
WDG Summit
description: Bring together like minded people and organisations to devise strategies for enacting global data sovereignty for individuals and nations, promoting ownership, security and transparency

name: WDG Investment Working Group
description: Working group to attrract investment supporting the objectives of the WDG, focused on membership of the  IDB Invest
